medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.CfnAbou:
The settings for the CDN of an HLS output.

The parent of this entity is HlsGroupSettings.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsAkam.Description: Sets up Akamai as the downstream system for the HLS output group.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsBasi.Description: The settings for Basic Put for the HLS output.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsMedi.Description: Sets up MediaStore as the destination for the HLS output.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsS3Se.Description: Sets up Amazon S3 as the destination for this HLS output.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsWebd.Description: The settings for Web VTT captions in the HLS output group.  The parent of this entity is HlsGroupSettings.
